table-205-205.caption: What are the ids and texts of paragraphs in the document titled 'Welcome to NY'?
data: Welcome to New York! We are excited to have you.
This document provides essential information for your visit.
Explore the city's iconic landmarks and cultural attractions.
Discover diverse neighborhoods, each with its unique charm.
Enjoy world-class dining, entertainment, and shopping experiences.
